theme: forge furnace idling between sporadic jobs
title: Forge Furnace Setback Ladder: Graded Idling Under Autocorrelated Job Gaps
strategies: blind constant setback: hold the same fixed setback level every gap, ignoring all data (baseline)
classic ski-rental: compute one aggregate average gap length from everything observed so far and commit to the cheaper of the two extreme levels (hold vs full shutdown)
regime-static ladder: use the given short/long regime means to pick a single expectation-optimal ladder level for the whole run, without reacting to recent history

Bayesian regime filtering + expected-cost ladder: forward-filter a belief over which regime is currently active from every gap observed so far, and choose the ladder level minimizing the FULL expected cost under that belief each chunk
